platform_waiver.decision: Path B — keep ENVIRONMENT=staging for now
platform_waiver.reason: Live clients already onboarded on this single-stack service. Formal verifier remains blocked only on ENVIRONMENT until a dedicated production profile or ENVIRONMENT=production flip is authorized.
platform_waiver.remaining_blocker: ENVIRONMENT must be explicitly set to production or prod
platform_waiver.controls_hardened: All bootstrap, demo seed, open-registration, and auth debug-return flags explicitly false; secrets present and distinct.
